overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City at night. The camera follows the character along elevated walkways and bridges, passing under massive highway overpasses and through neon-lit urban canyons with futuristic architecture and holographic billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated riverside walkway with highway overpasses

events.description: camera switches from following character in white outfit to following green-haired character
camera tilts upward to show vehicles traveling on elevated highway above
followed character passes camera and continues walking ahead

agents.ego_description: following a green-haired character along an elevated walkway, observing the futuristic city skyline and elevated highways

notable_agents.action: character in white outfit walking along railing, turning to face camera before passing by
green-haired character in dark outfit leading the way along the walkway

entered.detail: white concrete barrier separating walkway from drop to water below
massive curved highway overpass with vehicles traveling overhead
tall palm tree visible against the night sky near the water
tall illuminated skyscrapers with neon lights in the distance
modern street lamp with bright white light illuminating the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens following a character in white along an elevated walkway at night, with a concrete railing on the right and futuristic city skyline ahead. The camera switches to follow a green-haired character, tilts up to show traffic on the elevated highway above, then returns to forward facing as the character passes by and continues along the riverside path.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered bridge walkway beneath elevated highway system

events.description: passing under large metal overpass structure, temporarily obscuring sky view
red sports car passes by on the left side road, followed by other vehicles

agents.ego_description: proceeding along the walkway beneath overpasses, passing other pedestrians and observing traffic on the adjacent road

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue shirt and vest walking toward camera on the sidewalk
red sports car with glowing taillights driving past on the multi-lane road

entered.detail: massive steel and concrete highway support beams and framework overhead
multi-lane asphalt road with moving traffic separated by barrier

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the massive elevated highway system, the scene becomes more enclosed with steel overpass structures dominating the view. The camera passes other pedestrians walking in the opposite direction while vehicles travel on the road to the left. The lighting shifts to artificial sources from street lamps as the sky becomes partially obscured by the overhead infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with crosswalk beneath elevated highways

events.description: exiting covered bridge area into open intersection with visible crosswalk
crossing the multi-lane street at marked crosswalk while vehicles wait
entering area with bright neon signage and holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at an intersection and continuing along the sidewalk, passing pedestrians near a building with yellow neon trim

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white tank top and blue pants walking along the sidewalk
silver car driving past the intersection as the character crosses

entered.detail: marked pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt street
vertical traffic signal showing red light for vehicles
large digital billboard displaying animated advertisements with pink and white colors
large dark building with illuminated PETROCHEM signage on the facade

segments.scene_description: The character exits the covered bridge into an open urban intersection, crossing the street at a marked crosswalk. The Petrochem building looms on the left while large neon billboards become visible on the right. The environment transitions from industrial infrastructure to commercial neon-lit streets as the character continues past other pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with continuous elevated highway overhead

events.description: entering densely neon-lit corridor with yellow building trim and holographic displays
vehicle with bright headlights passes by on the left side street

agents.ego_description: walking along a narrow sidewalk next to a building with bright yellow neon lighting, observing the cyberpunk cityscape and passing parked vehicles

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking along the sidewalk in the distance under the neon lights

entered.detail: building wall with continuous yellow neon light strips and red triangular flags
large floating digital advertisement displaying animated characters
cars parked along the curb of the street
tall building with illuminated windows at the street corner ahead

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking along a narrow sidewalk beside a building illuminated with bright yellow neon strips and holographic billboards. The elevated highway curves overhead, casting shadows on the street below. The environment is distinctly cyberpunk with dense neon signage, parked cars, and the continuous presence of the overhead highway infrastructure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic cityscape that transitions from an open riverside walkway into a dense, neon-lit urban canyon. It begins by following characters along an elevated path with a concrete railing, tilting upward to reveal traffic on a highway above before continuing forward. As the camera moves deeper into the city, the environment becomes more enclosed beneath the massive steel structures of an elevated highway system, where artificial street lamps replace the open sky. The scene then opens into a wide urban intersection, shifting from industrial infrastructure to a commercial district as the character crosses a street flanked by the Petrochem building and glowing billboards. Finally, the camera glides along a narrow sidewalk illuminated by bright yellow neon strips and holographic signage, with the curving highway overhead casting deep shadows across the cyberpunk street.
